---
title: "Reference"
---

## Companion Documents

This section exposes the additional Markdown documents that support the benchmark narrative, audit framing, oracle semantics, and operational planning. They are published as companion references, not as primary navigation pages.

{{< include _includes/generated/reference_sections.md >}}

## Notes

::: {.note-block}
- The published reference set stays English-first.
- TeX sources and thesis-draft Spanish materials remain out of the public site navigation.
- The reference links point to copied public artifacts inside the rendered site, so they work without browsing the repository directly.
:::
